workflows.preview:
name: Analyst

on:
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: write
  pull-requests: write
  actions: read

jobs:
  analyst:
    if: contains(github.event.comment.body, '@analyst')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    concurrency:
      group: analyst-${{ github.event.issue.number }}
      cancel-in-progress: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Load analyst prompt
        id: role_prompt
        shell: bash
        run: |
          {
            echo 'text<<EOF'
            cat governance/prompts/analyst_prompt.md
            echo 'EOF'
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Run as ANALYST
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        with:
          claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          github_token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
          trigger_phrase: "@analyst"
          prompt: |
            ${{ steps.role_prompt.outputs.text }}

            Входящий комментарий:
            ${{ github.event.comment.body }}

            Работай строго как АНАЛИТИК. Опубликуй отчёт в текущем issue. В конце отчёта вызови @auditor.
          claude_args: "--max-turns 10"

name: Auditor

on:
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: write
  pull-requests: write
  actions: read

jobs:
  auditor:
    if: contains(github.event.comment.body, '@auditor')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    concurrency:
      group: auditor-${{ github.event.issue.number }}
      cancel-in-progress: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Load auditor prompt
        id: role_prompt
        shell: bash
        run: |
          {
            echo 'text<<EOF'
            cat governance/prompts/auditor_prompt.md
            echo 'EOF'
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Run as AUDITOR
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        with:
          claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          github_token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
          trigger_phrase: "@auditor"
          prompt: |
            ${{ steps.role_prompt.outputs.text }}

            Входящий комментарий:
            ${{ github.event.comment.body }}

            Работай строго как АУДИТОР. Проверь независимо. Дай APPROVED или BLOCKED. В конце вызови @executor или @analyst.
          claude_args: "--max-turns 10"

name: Claude Internal Auditor Dispatcher

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: read

concurrency:
  group: claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-internal-auditor:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Record dispatcher start
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_dispatcher_state.py start dispatcher_started
      - name: Claude internal auditor responds to mailbox
        id: claude
        continue-on-error: true
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
        with:
          claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          prompt: |
            You are Claude Internal Auditor for repository bereznyi-aleksandr/ai-devops-system.
            Read the newest item in governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/.
            Write a real response file to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem833b_claude_response.md.
            The response must start with: CLAUDE RESPONSE.
            Include DECISION: APPROVED, CHANGE_REQUIRED, or BLOCKED.
            Explain why prior response was missing if you can infer it.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
      - name: Record dispatcher complete
        if: always()
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_dispatcher_state.py complete ${{ steps.cl

name: Claude Primary Provider Gate

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/claude_primary_provider_gate.trigger'
      - 'scripts/claude_primary_provider_gate.py'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-primary-provider-gate.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-primary-provider-gate
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  check-claude-provider:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check provider gate script
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/claude_primary_provider_gate.py

      - name: Write provider gate result
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_primary_provider_gate.py

      - name: Commit provider gate result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/provider_gates/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.json governance/reports/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-609 Claude primary provider gate result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true

name: Claude Primary Runtime Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.trigger'
      - 'scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-primary-runtime-smoke.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-primary-runtime-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-primary-runtime-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check Claude runtime smoke
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py

      - name: Run Claude runtime smoke
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          AUDITOR_MODEL: ${{ secrets.AUDITOR_MODEL }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py

      - name: Commit Claude runtime smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json governance/reports/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-630 Claude runtime smoke result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true

name: Claude Token Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - '.github/workflows/claude-token-smoke.yml'
      - 'scripts/claude_token_smoke.py'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-token-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  check-secret:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Check secret presence and write report
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_token_smoke.py

      - name: Commit smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md governance/transport/results.jsonl
          git commit -m "BEM-568 Claude token smoke result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)

name: Claude Code

# BEM-477: added transport result write + file report
# BEM-488: YAML-safe rewrite — no f-string multiline, Python-based summary
# NO createComment to issue #31 (locked at 2500 comments)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      role:
        description: 'analyst | auditor | executor | curator'
        required: true
        type: string
      provider:
        description: 'claude'
        required: false
        default: 'claude'
        type: string
      trace_id:
        description: 'Trace id'
        required: true
        type: string
      cycle_id:
        description: 'Role cycle id'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      task_type:
        description: 'Task type'
        required: false
        default: 'default_development'
        type: string
      task:
        description: 'Task body'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]
  issues:
    types: [opened, assigned]
  pull_request_review_comment:
    types: [created]
  pull_request_review:
    types: [submitted]

permissions:
  contents: write
  pull-requests: write
  issues: write
  id-token: write
  actions: write

jobs:
  claude:
    if: |
      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
      (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' && contains(github.event.comment.body, '@claude') && !contains(github.event.comment.body, '@analyst') && !contains(github.event.comment.body, '@auditor') && !contains(github.event.comment.body, '@executor')) ||
      (github.event_name == 'issues' && (contains(git

name: Executor

on:
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: write
  pull-requests: write
  actions: read

jobs:
  executor:
    if: contains(github.event.comment.body, '@executor')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    concurrency:
      group: executor-${{ github.event.issue.number }}
      cancel-in-progress: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Load executor prompt
        id: role_prompt
        shell: bash
        run: |
          {
            echo 'text<<EOF'
            cat governance/prompts/executor_prompt.md
            echo 'EOF'
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Run as EXECUTOR
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        with:
          claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          github_token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
          trigger_phrase: "@executor"
          prompt: |
            ${{ steps.role_prompt.outputs.text }}

            Входящий комментарий:
            ${{ github.event.comment.body }}

            Работай строго как ИСПОЛНИТЕЛЬ. Выполни задачу. Опубликуй отчёт в текущем issue. В конце вызови @auditor.
          claude_args: "--max-turns 15"

next_action: patch Claude workflows to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY only
